failures.description: The agent misread or misused the ProductCatalogSearch result and answered with item 2243454707 at $164.46 instead of the actual cheapest item, 1240311797 at $137.17.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The relevant tool output was available at index 3 and clearly listed Electric Kettle results sorted by ascending price. The first item, 1240311797 at $137.17, is the cheapest available item. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer claiming item 2243454707 at $164.46 was cheapest, which contradicts the tool output and appears to select the last/most expensive listed item instead of the lowest-priced one. This is not an invalid tool invocation or unsupported intent; it is incorrect reasoning over returned evidence.
